tasks.title: VortxxCore UI Overhaul — Layout v6
tasks.description: 6 deploys: New layout (Weather full / Quick Links + Passwords + Schedule Snapshot / News + Sports + Markets), removed Agent Dashboard sidebar tab, removed Email/Projects/Tools/Contacts from core, pre-loaded Quick Links, Today's Schedule Snapshot widget, compact scrollable News, Ask Jasper rename. Layout v6, commit 582b06f.

tasks.title: Vortxx AI Email Evaluation + n8n Integration
tasks.description: Spec out AI email classification (spam/junk/categorize) on incoming Gmail. Build n8n workflow: Gmail → Supabase → OpenAI eval → folder routing. Also fix email retention bug and Gmail labels/folders linking in UI. Full spec to come from 1 PM strategy session Feb 25.

tasks.title: Build thefortnh.com — Full Website Redesign
tasks.description: Anchor produces copy + UX brief. Forge builds site. Mobile-first, 3 tiers, Mindbody, Molly PT section, trial CTA.

tasks.title: Fix Jasper HQ Chat Lag (bypass cron, direct API call)
tasks.description: Replace cron-polled chat with direct OpenAI API call in /api/chat/send. Target 3-4s response. Trigger Vercel deploy hook after push.

tasks.title: Build GiftHQ n8n Content Pipeline
tasks.description: Amazon PA API → OpenAI → ElevenLabs → Shotstack → YouTube/Pinterest/TikTok/Instagram/X. Phase 1: wire social accounts + Buffer shortcut.

tasks.title: Vortxx Full Codebase Audit
tasks.description: Review full codebase, console errors, broken routes, Supabase schema. Output: vortxx-audit-{date}.md with severity ratings.

tasks.title: Monomoy Site — /blog page + Helm Method first post
tasks.description: Beacon writes 1200-1800w Helm Method naming article. Forge builds /blog and publishes. Trigger Vercel deploy hook after push.

tasks.title: YTidy Launch Content Pack
tasks.description: Launch blog post (SEO), LinkedIn article, Product Hunt copy (tagline, description, maker comment, gallery captions).

tasks.title: HeartbeatGuard YouTube Launch Content
tasks.description: YouTube launch video script (3-5 min), SEO description, newsletter launch edition with subject line options.

tasks.title: GiftHQ Mother's Day Content Calendar
tasks.description: 4-week campaign calendar. Gift guides by price tier. Platform-specific copy for Pinterest, Instagram, X.

tasks.title: Vortxx AI Board Tab — Real-Time Sync
tasks.description: Supabase realtime subscriptions for AI Board tab. Prerequisite: task-004 (Vortxx audit) must complete first.

tasks.title: OpenClaw HQ Blog + SEO Content
tasks.description: Build /blog on openclawhq.ai. Populate with 3-5 SEO posts about AI agent systems.
